reviews.review_description: Nice mechanics, smooth playing, interesting game - something different.

To my surprise it's a great game. I normally avoid movement in VR experiences. I tried this one and I don't regret. It feels that devs spent lots of time and it works! No "side affects" after flying and in return this amazing feel of freedom. Like a bird! Recommended :-) Looking forward for updates and new fantastic, breath-catching locations.

There isn't a lot going on in this game. The mechanics of the game are fun for a while and the environments are nice to look at. It's almost more of an e penitence than a game, but there is some challenge a bit later on. I've played several levels and had a pretty good time bit I do wish the scenery changed once is a while. Even just switching to night time would be nice. Fitting too given that you're flying from lantern to lantern. To be fair, this might happen later in the game. To a game starved audience it may be worth a spot in your library, but it's not the full fledged game we've all been waiting for.
Spirit Journey is fun, addictive and challenge. Love it.
Beautiful and mellow, but the frustrating and unreliable controls made me rage quit the game. Death feels too much like a glitch sometimes.

Not my cup of tea but I can see this game appealing to younger or less aggressive gamers.  Music is somewhat annoying after a while but I didn't check to see if this had an 'off'  function. Worth the small price tag.
